trans-unit.target: 正在检查 Aspire 环境...
容器运行时

trans-unit.source: Diagnose Aspire environment issues and verify setup.
trans-unit.target: 诊断 Aspire 环境问题并验证设置。
详细先决条件请参见: https://aka.ms/aspire-prerequisites
环境
Aspire 环境检查
输出格式(表格或 Json)。
Node.js {0} is installed
trans-unit.note: {0} is the detected Node.js version string.

trans-unit.source: Node.js not found but required by this TypeScript AppHost
trans-unit.target: Node.js not found but required by this TypeScript AppHost
Install Node.js 20.19+ or 22.13+ from https://nodejs.org/.

trans-unit.source: Node.js {0} is below the supported version (20.19+ or 22.13+)
trans-unit.target: Node.js {0} is below the supported version (20.19+ or 22.13+)
trans-unit.note: {0} is the detected Node.js version string.

trans-unit.source: Upgrade Node.js to 20.19+ or 22.13+ from https://nodejs.org/.
trans-unit.target: Upgrade Node.js to 20.19+ or 22.13+ from https://nodejs.org/.

trans-unit.source: npx not found but required by npm-managed TypeScript AppHosts
trans-unit.target: npx not found but required by npm-managed TypeScript AppHosts

trans-unit.source: npx ships with Node.js; ensure your Node.js installation is on PATH.
trans-unit.target: npx ships with Node.js; ensure your Node.js installation is on PATH.
{0} {1} is installed
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package manager display name (e.g., 'npm'), {1} is the version or path.

trans-unit.target: {0} is installed
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package manager display name (e.g., 'npm').

trans-unit.source: {0} not found but required by this TypeScript AppHost
trans-unit.target: {0} not found but required by this TypeScript AppHost
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package manager display name (e.g., 'pnpm').

trans-unit.source: Install {0} to run this TypeScript AppHost.
trans-unit.target: Install {0} to run this TypeScript AppHost.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package manager display name (e.g., 'pnpm').

trans-unit.target: Polyglot AppHost
.NET SDK
摘要: {0} 通过,{1} 警告， {2} 失败

trans-unit.source: Yarn Classic (v1) detected; Aspire supports Yarn 4 or later
trans-unit.target: Yarn Classic (v1) detected; Aspire supports Yarn 4 or later

trans-unit.source: Upgrade to Yarn 4+ via 'corepack prepare yarn@stable --activate' or follow the Yarn install guide.
trans-unit.target: Upgrade to Yarn 4+ via 'corepack prepare yarn@stable --activate' or follow the Yarn install guide.
